textByHash.027812c2dd76e55acf81761b0913e3eab68370a5: We believe a mortal to be involved.
textByHash.02cee0888d2f3e481b5dde01139234f2f0125f8a: The body was of one who died a long time ago.
textByHash.2d5ff57b0b2c8ec0be7cd6b39128f10574e9d69c: Then you should have paid more attention.
textByHash.31a2ded4e8618ea829fe20b505782bcd83831dde: They can do no more harm.
textByHash.3c17c60dbbdffcd5c0064a6d5c4d9a7f95def81e: In a way. But it was not meant for that.
textByHash.435155c6f85a6ee2af0f0c4fea4e8feea76012c6: The human makes a valid point.
textByHash.4dca63aa8cda67ef4a95a97818458af7b3ec65da: The Altar is fine, but its power has been redirected.
textByHash.53a2a19f05d81a7bd6305739eb514bb8d7dd5660: You assume it was a trade.
textByHash.5e69d0038dac3f02f5ace0fa2d2817b00fca92af: Then you have what you need.
textByHash.6d9ebf5d63ea44faed108ee6536e32788fed8d67: But they misused it. And the world suffered.
textByHash.6f36d18be9ee655f34b10204f89a55a27a1c4817: A zombie is soulless. An empty shell, reanimated by magic.
textByHash.78fadd1b8bdb23879021fe83af8eba84130ea0be: We have found the cause of your problem.
textByHash.7b13518834c78db07442a86f9247e4590e240a7d: Our purpose was to wait. But we saw the world burn.
textByHash.82a927728ecfe579319691329ac349ede96430a4: We have no part in this.
textByHash.9e0cffbaf7c9e883e0d2b084f54467e4797e91ec: There is a grave there. Within it lies a soul, trapped inside a corpse.
textByHash.b39185b4016906f7c79d5b2640bcb212797f118e: For every death, there must be life.
textByHash.bf8b99d2365245fe61de1cd251ecf10a0aca18cd: For without balance, the world burns.
textByHash.c286280bb8788c6ab839bdeec4177d99e48e99cc: But life can also destroy. It can endanger the anima.
textByHash.ce7bf556f19168bdb936c4d0814ca85a22a8cb6b: But we needed time to determine the problem.
textByHash.d1307e9f2b0a1a11851822f208fbaaec55e08ea9: In the time of the great betrayer.
textByHash.de7483b351fd9683441fde2527d1a640a6c8e4bb: You'll find it in a grave.
textByHash.df67e92e29187e903da160d7e2106cca0cb3f849: We may have further use for you.
textByHash.ed15e76b1aa591b44c8be32a039ab2fd2544f12f: It is our place to know.
